MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-17-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.

Kurtiss Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC.
Defendant David Hirtz was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on April 22, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Kurtiss. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, on or before September 28, 2009, defendant David Hirtz shall pay plaintiff the sum of $179.42. On or before November 2, 2009, defendants shall pay defendant the sum of $2,397.40 to settle the account in full, or pay $179.42 on the 2nd of each month for 22 consecutive months until the balance is paid in full. If the 2nd of any month falls on a weekend or holiday, defendant's payment shall be due on the following business day.

If defendant opts for this latter payment option, he (defendant) shall have one right to correct any default for failure to make a monthly payment. If defendant fails to cure the default, plaintiff may enter judgment against defendant as follow: $3,506.86 - outstanding balance; 10% post-judgment interest; $378.00 - prejudgment interest; $609.00 - Attorney Fees and $286 - costs. The Court shall retain jurisdiction over this matter pursuant to CCP Section 664.46.

Mr. Hirtz was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the agreement. The terms of this agreement shall be reduced to writing by Mr. Jacobs.

Matter is continued to Janaury 17, 2012 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
